name: Chilaquile Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 small Can pitted black olives or
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 8 to 10
Preheat large skillet, add oil, onion and green pepper. Saute until onion is transparent.
Add beef and stir fry until meat is crumbly and has lost red color.
Add seasonings and let simmer for a few seconds to develop flavor.
Add chili sauce, corn and olives. Cover and simmer 30 minutes.
Cut up the tortillas or tear them. Fry but do not brown, then drain.
Start with a double layer of tortilla pieces in the bottom of a large, well greased casserole dish.
Alternate layers of tortillas, meat mixture and grated cheese, ending with cheese on top.
Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
Garnish with green onions, coriander sprigs and sliced radishes.
